notes: Original provenance notebook; conceptually the root of the whole project even though later notebooks split its responsibilities.
First successful compaction of the monolithic baseline into a rerunnable demonstration notebook.
First large split of the early research pipeline into reusable training, calibration, and detector-preparation stages.
Second long-form research revision that tightens the page-localization branch and reduces some of the scaffolding duplication seen in notebook (2).
Research revision that keeps the long-form structure but pivots the ending toward an explicit quality-boost inference factory.
Long-form research notebook that upgrades the geometry side of the pipeline and hardens training for more difficult page conditions.
Continuation of the geometry-aware branch that promotes the phase-2 work into a higher-fidelity phase-3 inference engine.
Turns stronger segmentation architecture and combat-mode YOLO training into an explicit late-stage strategy.
Optimization-focused follow-up to notebook (7) that keeps the same overall structure but retunes the segmentation branch with hybrid loss and AdamW.
Represents the last large single-model research notebook and the clearest phase-10 fine-tuning milestone.
Collapses the research branch into a compact Kaggle runner and starts the long deployment-hardening era.

Reopens training after the compact era to create the phase-10, EfficientNet-B3, and DeepLabV3+ competitor bundle. Conceptual ancestor is notebook (9) even though the primary predecessor in review order is notebook (41).
Packages notebook (42) into a compact runner so ensemble and benchmark variants can be compared quickly.
Intentional baseline-only detour used to measure the old single-model path after the ensemble branch opened.

EffB3-focused inference notebook that also makes runtime warnings and timing decisions more explicit.

Adds explicit pid-to-image coverage diagnostics before inference, making data-index confidence part of runtime behavior.
Replaces the repaired V41 engine with a more heavily quality-gated V42 inference path.
Final modular rewrite and the best candidate for the refactor starting point, although final checkpoint pairing still depends on runtime discovery.
